title: The Face Behind the Scar
writer: Rudolph Lothar, Ákos Tolnay, Reginald Long
actors: Griffith Jones, Rosalyn Boulter, Cecil Ramage
plot: James Martin and Carol Wall have plans to elope, but a fight with her father's solicitor ends in murder committed by an unknown third-party, and Martin is hunted for the crime, knowing the solicitor was alive when he left him. Car...
